contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Document Hit List 13-state machine in agentic_ai_context (flowchart + transition tables)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/89
  
  Details:
  Per Gary 2026-05-03: 'probably one of the MD files should really illustrate the flow chart between the different states of Hit List and what are the conditions for flowing from one state to another and during each state what is it? Otherwise it becomes hard for a human to reason about the states.' New HIT_LIST_STATE_MACHINE.md grounds the entire 13-state machine in actual code (greps of every status string + every transition writer in market_research/scripts), so it stays in sync with what the code does rather than what someone thinks it does. Includes: TL;DR happy-path linear flow, Mermaid stateDiagram of every state + transition, state definitions table (state, meaning, who reads, who writes), per-source-state transition tables with conditions + trigger scripts, cron schedule table mapping each cron to the transitions it drives, and anti-patterns / common gotchas section. Two states explicitly flagged as LEGACY post-PR #101: AI: Shortlisted and AI: Photo needs review (both produced by the retired photo+Grok cron). Cross-links to PLACES_API_CACHING.md, PARTNER_OUTREACH_PROTOCOL.md, HIT_LIST_CONTACT_ENRICHMENT.md.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
